result.stdout:
🚀 SX - SSH File Transfer System

Usage: sx [options]

Options:
  -p, --port <port>     Port to listen on (default: 53690)
  -d, --dir <path>      Download directory (default: ~/Downloads)
      --max-size <size> Maximum file size (default: 100MB)
      --no-overwrite    Don't overwrite existing files
  -h, --help            Show this help

Examples:
  sx
  sx --port 9999 --dir /tmp/downloads
  sx --max-size 1GB --no-overwrite

Remote usage (after setting up SSH tunnel):
  echo -e 'FILENAME:test.txt\nSIZE:11\nDATA:\nHello World' | nc localhost 53690
